scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm -w apps/yawnbot run dev" "npm -w apps/unityfree-bot run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -k "npm -w apps/yawnbot run start" "npm -w apps/unityfree-bot run start"
scripts.deploy: concurrently -k "npm -w apps/yawnbot run deploy" "npm -w apps/unityfree-bot run deploy"
